Phoenix
Your coach. Your programme.
Built around you — and rebuilt every week.
Most apps give you a plan and leave you to it. Phoenix gives you a coach that reads your data, watches your progress, and adapts what's next. Every week is different because every week you are.
That code isn't recognised. Check your invite and try again.
Already have an account?
Project Phoenix
Welcome to Project Phoenix.

You're one of fifty people who got here before the door opened.

Project Phoenix exists because someone needed it to. It's still becoming what it's meant to be — as are the people who are a part of it. You're here while it's still being forged.

You are now part of Phoenix Pro. For life. Not a trial, not a beta perk, lifetime. As long as Phoenix exists, your access doesn't expire. The next eight weeks are yours to put it through its paces and tell us what you find.

It's being shaped in real time. If something feels wrong or needs rethinking, that's why you're here.

Three things from you:

— Train. Use the app the way you'd actually use it. Don't be careful with it.

— Tell us when it breaks. Bugs, confusion, anything off. No detail too small.

— Tell us what's missing. If a feature should exist and doesn't, say so.

When the eight weeks are up, we'll ask you three questions:

— If you weren't getting this free — would Phoenix be worth $14.99/month to you?

— Would you genuinely recommend this to someone who'd benefit?

— What would make you cancel?

We're asking for honest answers, not kind ones.

When the public launch happens later this year, what you helped build will be Project Phoenix.

Let's Rise…

Step 2 — Health check
Your Safety
Matters
Health Advisory
Phoenix is a challenging programme. Before starting, please consult your GP or healthcare provider if you have any medical conditions, injuries, or have been inactive for an extended period.
PAR-Q Health Screening
Has your doctor ever said you have a heart condition?
Yes
No
Do you feel pain in your chest during physical activity?
Yes
No
Do you lose balance or consciousness from dizziness?
Yes
No
Do you have a bone or joint problem that could be worsened by exercise?
Yes
No
Are you currently pregnant or have given birth in the last 6 months?
Yes
No
You answered yes to one or more questions. We recommend consulting your doctor before starting. You can still proceed but please train with appropriate caution.
Injury assessment
Tap any area where you have a current or recent injury. Your programme will work around it.
Front
Back

Training
History
Yes
No
Less than 3 months
3-6 months

1-2 years
2+ years

Step 4 — Direction & numbers
Your Goals
& Numbers
A — Goals
Tap your primary goal first, then optionally a secondary.
Strength & PowerGet stronger. Move heavier. Build a foundation.
Hypertrophy & Body CompositionBuild muscle and improve composition
Fat LossLose body fat while keeping or building muscle
General FitnessConditioning, capacity, all-round health
Athletic PerformanceSpeed, power, sport-specific output
Secondary goal optional — tap a second card or skip.
B — Sport (optional)
Does sport play a role in your training?
Actively competingProgramme me for sport performance
Sport backgroundUse it to influence my programme
Not relevant right nowPure goal-based programming
Off-season
Pre-season
In-season
C — Programme target
Do you have a goal you're training toward?
The Phoenix CombinePeak for the annual test battery in July — strength, power and conditioning tests across 2 days
A specific eventRace, season, competition or challenge
Quarterly progress checksNo specific peak — benchmark every 12 weeks
No specific eventJust get fitter and stronger
D — Assessment scores
Do you know any of your current numbers? The more you share, the more accurate your programme from day one. If you don't know them yet — no problem, your coach will build assessment into your first block.
Add more numbers +
Pass
Fail
E — Weigh-in frequency
For best accuracy, weigh yourself first thing in the morning after toilet, before food or water.
Daily — morning, same conditions
Every few days
Weekly — Sunday morning
I'd rather not track weight
F — Weekly check-in day
Your coach reviews your week and builds next week's programme on this day.
FridayPlan your weekend + next week ahead (default)
SaturdayReview the week, set up Sunday onwards
SundayTraditional end of week review
MondayStart the week with intention
G — Notes for your coach
Training goals, upcoming events, life context, injury history not covered above — anything that helps your coach build the right programme.
Step 5 — Training days
Pick Your
Training Days
Choose your training days — pick between 3 and 6 days, any combination. Your coach builds entirely around your schedule.
Tap AM or PM on any day to add a session — pick the duration from the popup. Tap an active slot again to remove it.
Step 6 — Coach mode
Who Picks
The Sessions?
You've locked in your training days. Now decide who decides what each day's session is.
Let my coach decideAI builds your sessions based on your goals + schedule (recommended)
I'll choose my sessionsPick the session type for each day slot (strength / hypertrophy / conditioning / mixed)
Step 7 — Your timetable
Session
Timetable
Tap any slot to pick what your coach should program. Leave it as Coach decides and the AI picks the best fit for that day.
Step 8 — Your coach
Coach
Communication
How do you want your coach to communicate with you?
Challenge meDirect, high standards, no excuses
Support meEncouraging, patient, build me up
Just the factsGive me the programme, I handle the motivation
Mix it upRead my data and adapt
Step 9 — Confirm
Participation
Agreement
Before we build your programme, please confirm the following.
Your programme summary
PHOENIX PLAN
Full Waiver
Participation agreement

1. Assumption of Risk

I understand that participation in physical exercise and training activities involves inherent risks of injury. These risks include, but are not limited to, muscle strains, joint injuries, cardiovascular events, and other physical harm. I voluntarily assume all such risks.

2. Medical Clearance

I confirm that I have consulted with, or have chosen not to consult with, a qualified medical professional regarding my ability to participate in this programme. I represent that I am in adequate physical condition to participate in the activities described in this application.

3. Pre-Existing Conditions

I acknowledge that I have disclosed any known pre-existing medical conditions, injuries, or physical limitations within this application. I understand that Project Phoenix and its creators are not liable for any injury or health event arising from undisclosed conditions.

4. Exercise Intensity

I understand that this programme contains high-intensity exercise including heavy resistance training, cardiovascular conditioning, and Olympic weightlifting movements. I will exercise my own judgement and cease activity if I experience pain, dizziness, chest discomfort, or unusual symptoms. I will seek medical attention immediately if required.

5. Professional Coaching

I understand and acknowledge the app's recommendation to seek qualified coaching for complex movements including barbell squats, deadlifts, Olympic lifts, and gymnastics movements. I accept full responsibility for my technique and loading decisions.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, I release, waive, and discharge Project Phoenix, its creators, developers, and affiliates from any and all claims, demands, damages, or liability arising from my participation in this programme.

7. Voluntary Participation

I confirm that my participation is entirely voluntary. I understand I may stop at any time. I have read and understood this agreement and agree to be bound by its terms.

8. Jurisdiction

This agreement is governed by the laws of Queensland, Australia. By accepting, I confirm I am of legal age to enter into this agreement in my jurisdiction.

PHOENIX PLAN
What's coming
This is just
the beginning
Phoenix is growing. You're part of something that's going to be much bigger than an app.
Coming soon
Achievement system
Earn badges and tokens for every milestone — first session, PRs, phase completions, walk streaks. The rarest badge is earned, not bought.
Coming soon
The Phoenix Combine
A standardised test battery drawn from NFL Combine, AFL Combine, CrossFit and strength sport standards. Test yourself quarterly. Compare to elite athletes. A live annual event is planned.
Coming soon
Community + leaderboards
Connect with other Phoenix members. Post PRs, share progress, compete on relative strength leaderboards. Your comeback story, shared with people who get it.
Available now
Sleep & Meditation
Wind down with guided meditation, sleep sounds, and recovery tracking. Build better habits for rest and regeneration.
Coming soon
Nutrition companion
A smart meal planning tool that calculates exact ingredient quantities for your macros, integrates with Coles and Woolworths for delivery, and tracks leftovers. No food wasted.
Further ahead
Phoenix swag
Achievement-unlocked merchandise. You can't buy a Phoenix Combine hoodie — you have to earn it.
Want to be first to know?
Drop your email and we'll tell you when new features land. No spam. Ever.

Built Like
A Badass
Enter your TRUE 1-rep maxes. The app calculates every working set across all 12 weeks. Be honest — an inflated max breaks the programme.

PHOENIX PLAN

  






  
  

    

    
Our Story

    
You were
an athlete.

    
Life happened. Now you're ready to come back.
This is exactly what Phoenix was built for.

  


  
  


    
The Beginning

    

      
      Your story coming soon. This is where you tell the world why Phoenix exists — the years away, the moment you decided to come back, and what it felt like when you did.
    


    
Who This Is For

    

      Phoenix isn't for beginners. It isn't for elite athletes. It's for the person in between — someone who knows what hard work feels like, who remembers what it was like to be fit, strong and competitive — and wants to find that again.
    


    
The Mission

    

      Help first. Money second. Phoenix is a one-off payment, no subscriptions, no tricks. We built the app we wished existed when we came back. Everything in here is designed to meet you exactly where you are and take you somewhere you haven't been in years.
    


    
    

      
What people are saying

      

        
        Testimonials coming soon.
      

    


    
    

      

        
—

        
Members

      

      

        
—

        
Sessions logged

      

    


    
    

      
      

        
Built in Brisbane, Australia

        
Built for everyone who wants to come back.

      

    


    

      
Rise.

PHOENIX ASSESS

  





  
Self-Assessment

  
Test yourself.
Know your numbers.

  
Run these tests when your programme specifies, or any time you want to know where you stand. All results save to your profile automatically.


  
  

    

      

        
Accelerometer test

        
Vertical Jump

      

      
—

    

    
Place your phone in your shorts pocket or waistband. Stand still, then jump as high as you can. The app measures your air time and calculates jump height.

    

    
  


  
  

    

      

        
Timed test

        
Plank Hold

      

      
0:00

    

    
Forearm plank, hips level, shoulders over elbows. Start the timer, hold as long as possible, tap Stop when done.

    

      
      
    

  


  
  

    
Enter your results

    

      
      
      
mm:ss

    

    

      
      
      
mm:ss — 1.6km

    

    

      
      
    

    
  


  

    Phoenix Combine — coming soon
    The full Combine test battery including strength 1RMs, power, conditioning and sprint testing will be available as a dedicated quarterly event. Your scores here become your baseline.

Reset

      
My Programme

    

    
×

  

  
Pick the option that fits where you are now. Your training history is always kept.

  

    
Rebuild My Programme

    
Keep all your personal data, goals and schedule — just generate a fresh programme. Use this if your current plan isn't working or you want a new phase.

  

  

    
New Programme + Update Profile

    
Re-run the full questionnaire to update your goals, training days, injuries or schedule. Your name, body stats, and training history are kept.

  

  

    
Full Reset — Wipe Everything

    
Nuclear option. Clears your programme, all settings and questionnaire answers. Your session history is preserved. Use only if starting completely from scratch.

THE AGOGE

    

  

  

    

      

      

        
Optional Challenge

        
The Agoge

        
The hardest thing Phoenix asks of you.

      

    

    

      
The Agoge is a two-part challenge.

      
The March — walk or run 246 km. The distance from Athens to Sparta. The route the Spartans marched before their greatest battles. You accumulate every kilometre from your daily walks and WOD runs.

      
The Block — complete your full coach-prescribed training block without breaking the chain.

      
Both together. That's The Agoge.

      
It has no fixed timeline. Your coach prescribes your weekly march distance alongside your training. You finish when you finish.

      
When you complete The Agoge, you earn the Λ — the Spartan lambda. It appears on your profile. It never goes away.

      
This is optional. It is not for everyone. But if you're here, you're probably considering it.
